subcodes.first_line: Know thou that the heedless ones have banished Us from the land of mystery, that thereby they might extinguish the light of God amidst all else. He refused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلم بان الغافلین اخرجونا من ارض السر لیطفئوا بذلک نور الله بین ما سواه ابی
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
